allow: Bash(wsl -- bash -c "which x86_64-elf-gcc || ls /opt/cross/bin/ 2>/dev/null || ls ~/cross/bin/ 2>/dev/null || find /usr -name ''x86_64-elf-gcc'' 2>/dev/null | head -5")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "which qemu-system-x86_64 2>/dev/null && echo ''QEMU mevcut'' || echo ''QEMU yok''")

Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && timeout 8 qemu-system-x86_64 -cdrom MertOS.iso -m 256M -serial stdio -no-reboot -no-shutdown -display none -vga std 2>&1 | head -60")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && make MertOS.iso 2>&1")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && cp iso/boot/grub/grub.cfg /tmp/grub_test.cfg && grub-mkrescue -o MertOS.iso iso/ 2>&1 && echo ''ISO rebuilt''")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && cp kernel.elf iso/boot/kernel.elf && grub-mkrescue -o MertOS.iso iso/ 2>&1 && echo ''ISO OK''")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && make clean && make 2>&1")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && make 2>&1 | tail -10")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && make 2>&1 | grep -E ''\(error|warning|OK|ISO\)''")
Bash(wsl -- bash -c "cd ''/mnt/d/Mevcut Projeler/İşletim Sistemi'' && make 2>&1 | grep -E ''\(error|warning.*error|OK|ISO\)''")
